title: K Raheja Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: K Raheja Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
